options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: completion_type
options.description: Set goal for game completion

options.name: area_rando
options.description: Randomize Entrances

options.name: buddy_checks
options.description: Bob-omb Buddies are checks, Cannon Unlocks are items

options.name: exclamation_boxes
options.description:
Include 1Up Exclamation Boxes during randomization.
Adds 29 locations to the pool.

options.name: combined_progressive_keys
options.description:
Off - Use grouped castle keys: Dark World Key, Progressive Basement Key x2, Progressive Upstairs Key x3.

On - Use a single combined Progressive Key with six tiers for all castle key doors.

options.name: enable_locked_paintings
options.description:
Determine how paintings are treated.

Off - Paintings are not locked, as long as you can access them you can enter them (Vanilla behavior).

On - Paintings (other than Bob-omb Battlefield) are replaced in the pool with items to allow access to them.
Attempting to enter a locked painting will simply kick Mario out.
Does not affect secrets and levels that don't have a painting (Big Boo's Haunt, Hazy Maze Cave, Rainbow Ride).
This only affects the ability for Mario to enter a painting, the destination of the painting may change due to Entrance Randomization, if it is enabled.

options.name: strict_cap_requirements
options.description: If disabled, Stars that expect special caps may have to be acquired without the caps

options.name: per_level_cap_items
options.description:
Generate separate cap items for each level that can require a cap instead of one global item per cap
type.

options.name: strict_cannon_requirements
options.description:
If disabled, Stars that expect cannons may have to be acquired without them.
Has no effect if Buddy Checks and Move Randomizer are disabled

options.name: hazy_maze_cave_swimming_beast
options.display_name: Shuffle Hazy Maze Cave - Swimming Beast
options.description: Shuffle Hazy Maze Cave - Swimming Beast as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with it unlocked.

options.name: rainbow_ride_carpets
options.description: Shuffle Rainbow Ride - Carpets as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with them unlocked.

options.name: checkerboard_platforms
options.description:
Choose how Checkerboard Platform unlocks are handled.

Not Shuffled - The client starts with all Checkerboard Platforms unlocked.

Global - Shuffle one Checkerboard Platforms item that unlocks every applicable platform.

Individual - Shuffle separate level-specific Checkerboard Platforms items where supported by the client.

options.name: tiny_huge_island_warp_pipes
options.description: Shuffle Tiny-Huge Island - Warp Pipes as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with them unlocked.

options.name: cool_cool_mountain_baby_penguins
options.display_name: Shuffle Cool, Cool Mountain - Baby Penguins
options.description: Shuffle Cool, Cool Mountain - Baby Penguins as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with them unlocked.

options.name: snowmans_land_penguin
options.description: Shuffle Snowman's Land - Penguin as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with it unlocked.

options.name: shifting_sand_land_pyramid_elevator
options.display_name: Shuffle Shifting Sand Land - Pyramid Elevator
options.description: Shuffle Shifting Sand Land - Pyramid Elevator as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with it unlocked.

options.name: rolling_logs
options.description:
Choose how Rolling Log unlocks are handled.

Not Shuffled - The client starts with all Rolling Logs unlocked.

Global - Shuffle one Rolling Logs item that unlocks every applicable log.

Individual - Shuffle separate level-specific Rolling Log items where supported by the client.

options.name: purple_switches
options.description:
Choose how Purple Switch unlocks are handled.

Not Shuffled - The client starts with all Purple Switches unlocked.

Global - Shuffle one Purple Switches item that unlocks every applicable switch.

Individual - Shuffle separate level-specific Purple Switch items where supported by the client.

options.name: wet_dry_world_water_level_diamond
options.display_name: Shuffle Wet-Dry World - Water Level Diamond
options.description: Shuffle Wet-Dry World - Water Level Diamond as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with it unlocked.

options.name: tick_tock_clock_spinners
options.description: Shuffle Tick Tock Clock - Spinners as an Archipelago item. If disabled, the client starts with them unlocked.

options.name: bob_omb_battlefield_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Bob-omb Battlefield.

options.name: whomps_fortress_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Whomp's Fortress.

options.name: jolly_roger_bay_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Jolly Roger Bay Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Jolly Roger Bay.

options.name: cool_cool_mountain_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Cool, Cool Mountain Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Cool, Cool Mountain.

options.name: big_boos_haunt_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Big Boo's Haunt Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Big Boo's Haunt.

options.name: hazy_maze_cave_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Hazy Maze Cave Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Hazy Maze Cave.

options.name: lethal_lava_land_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Lethal Lava Land Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Lethal Lava Land.

options.name: shifting_sand_land_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Shifting Sand Land Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Shifting Sand Land.

options.name: dire_dire_docks_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Dire, Dire Docks Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Dire, Dire Docks.

options.name: snowmans_land_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Snowman's Land.

options.name: wet_dry_world_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Wet-Dry World.

options.name: tall_tall_mountain_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Tall, Tall Mountain Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Tall, Tall Mountain.

options.name: tiny_huge_island_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Tiny-Huge Island.

options.name: tick_tock_clock_coin_star_requirement
options.display_name: Tick Tock Clock Coin Star Requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Tick Tock Clock.

options.name: rainbow_ride_coin_star_requirement
options.description: Coins needed for the Coin Star in Rainbow Ride.

options.name: enable_move_rando
options.description:
Mario is unable to perform some actions until a corresponding item is picked up.
This option is incompatible with builds using a 'nomoverando' branch.
Specific actions to randomize can be specified in the YAML.

options.name: move_rando_actions
options.description: Which actions to randomize when Move Randomizer is enabled

options.name: strict_move_requirements
options.description:
If disabled, Stars that expect certain moves may have to be acquired without them. Only makes a difference
if Move Randomization is enabled

options.name: marios_hat
options.description: Add Mario's Hat as a useful item. If disabled, the client starts with it unlocked.

options.name: mario_colors
options.description:
Cosmetic Mario palette. Keys may be shirt, overalls, gloves, shoes, skin, or hair, with each value being
an RGB array.

options.name: music_shuffle
options.description:
Control in-game background music.

Off - Use vanilla music.

Shuffle - Archipelago sends a deterministic per-area music map.

Random on Load - The client picks a random song each time an area loads.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
